name: node-runner
description: Server-authoritative multiplayer 2D survival game built with JavaScript, Canvas and Socket.IO.

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check server/GameRoom.js && node --check server/arena.js && node --check public/js/main.js && node --check public/js/GameClient.js && node --check public/js/Renderer.js && node --check public/js/UI.js && node --check public/js/AudioManager.js && node --check public/js/PlayerPreferences.js
scripts.release:check: npm run check && npm test && npm run desktop:validate
scripts.build:win: npm run release:check && electron-builder --projectDir desktop --config ../electron-builder.config.cjs --win portable zip --x64
scripts.build:win:portable: npm run release:check && electron-builder --projectDir desktop --config ../electron-builder.config.cjs --win portable --x64
scripts.build:win:zip: npm run release:check && electron-builder --projectDir desktop --config ../electron-builder.config.cjs --win zip --x64
